warnings: 14 Epic/Legendary levels detected — heroic classes shown explicitly; epic levels stored as build.epicLevels for HP/CON purposes.

items.name: Legendary University Champion's Helm
items.description:
This helm was clearly used by some past adventurer, but that hasn't diminished
its potential.

items.name: Dracolich's Eye
items.description: This magically preserved eye, on a long chain, lends its sight to its wearer.
items.dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

items.name: Legendary Periapt of Charisma
items.description:
A mark of charisma, recognizing the bearer's leadership while emboldening their
confidence.
items.dropLocation: Voices of the Dead, end chest

augmentSlots.selectedAugment: Solar Gem of Physical Resistance Rating (Legendary)

items.name: Legendary University Archer's Cloak
items.description:
Though it's a bit frayed from the winds and time, there's still possibility
weaved into this cloak's threads.
items.dropLocation: Enemy of My Enemy, End chest

items.name: Legendary Waistwrap of Wild Wisdom
items.description: A light cloth waistwrap for those headed out into the woods.
items.dropLocation: Death Hosts This Banquet, end chest

items.name: Legendary Gloves of the Resilient
items.description:
Light enough to not impede movement, but somehow sturdy enough to stop a blade,
these gloves have seen their share of conflict.

items.name: Legendary Greaves of Seasons' Warding
items.description: Made to withstand the harshness of any season, these aged boots show no wear.

items.name: Legendary University Spellshield's Reinforced Shirt
items.description:
Arcane energies run through this shirt, protecting the wearer from a variety
of magics.
items.dropLocation: Enemy of My Enemy, End chest

items.name: Light Crossbow of the Undying Age
items.description: The ritual's power has imbued this weapon with an immortal fire and unholy purpose.
items.dropLocation:
Ritual Table, Turn in 
Legendary Light Crossbow of the Golden Age 
120 Barrier Fragments

items.name: Quiver of Alacrity
items.description:
Said to allow the user to draw arrows or bolts at a very fast rate, this large,
thin quiver will hold 3 different types of arrow or bolt and can store each
type of up to 1500. Total capacity: 4500.

items.name: Legendary Ring of Mystic Charisma
items.description:
Once held by those chosen by the Blade Rites, this ring confers both Martial
and Magical prowess.
items.dropLocation: Ruins of Myth Drannor, red-named encounter chests

items.name: Legendary Ring of Unnatural Accuracy
items.description:
Somehow, this band allows its bearer a level of precision and focus that would
be impossible for the average mind.
